Pedro Cao Eiriz is a graphic and 3D designer from A Coruña, Spain, currently based in Barcelona where he studied Publicidad y RRPP at the Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona (2023–2025). llm_summary.summary: Pedro Cao Eiriz is a Spanish national from A Coruña, Galicia (registered address: R. Filantropía, 36, 15011 A Coruña). He is a self-employed freelance graphic and 3D designer (autónomo) since January 2022, operating under his own name and previously associated with the Caosboi clothing and design brand in La Coruña (2019–2022). His LinkedIn profile places his current location in Barcelona, Catalonia, where he studied Publicidad y RRPP at the Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona (2023–2025). He also studied at the Universidade de Vigo (2021–2023). Seasonal hospitality employment is confirmed: Bar Waiter at Noa Boutique Hotel, La Coruña (Jun–Sep 2021); Hostelero at Leinster House Hotel, London (Jul–Sep 2023); Bar Waiter at Bar Lord, La Coruña (Jun–Sep 2024). A residential property at the registered A Coruña address is confirmed via Catastro: 172 m², residential use, built 1935, with an estimated sale value of €357,000–€536,000 and estimated rental value of €1,000/month. His email (pedrocaoeiriz@gmail.com) appears in 2 data breaches (earliest 2017, latest 2018), with one weak-hash password exposed. Case debt amount, origin, age, call history, and legal asset finding are not recorded in the case file.
key_facts: Registered address: R. Filantropía, 36, 15011 A Coruña, ES
Current location per LinkedIn: Barcelona, Catalonia, ES

Operated Caosboi clothing/design brand, La Coruña, January 2019–January 2022
Seasonal hospitality work: Noa Boutique Hotel La Coruña (Jun–Sep 2021), Leinster House Hotel London (Jul–Sep 2023), Bar Lord La Coruña (Jun–Sep 2024)
Residential property confirmed at registered address: 172 m², built 1935, catastral reference 7318020NJ4071N0001HM
Email found in 2 data breaches (2017 and 2018); one weak-hash password exposed
Debt amount, debt origin, debt age, call history, and legal asset finding are unknown

breaches_details.details: 8fit, a popular fitness and health app, experienced a data breach. The breach occurred in early 2021, with the database made public later in June. The leaked data included email addresses and usernames, along with salted MD5 password hashes.

Data breach that occurred at Taringa, a Latin American social network in 2018. The data breach was the result of a hacking incident in which the personal information of over 28 million users was exposed. The data that was compromised included email addresses, hashed passwords, and personal information such as names, birth dates, and location data.
